title: Typed AppState replacing addon.data
goal: Replace untyped addon.data with typed AppState interface and scoped accessor functions. Entry-point files (index.ts, addon.ts) may access addon.data directly; all others use accessors.
in_scope: Define AppState interface with sub-interfaces in src/addon.ts
Update all consuming files to use typed accessors
acceptance: Grep addon.data. in src/ returns matches ONLY in addon.ts, state.ts, and index.ts
